nodes.text: Greetings, rolling pioneer. I have balanced atop this spire for eons. What brings a sphere of your... diameter to these heights?

choices.text: I seek the summit and the Final Boss.

nodes.text: The summit? A treacherous path. Many have rolled high, only to fall further. Proceed with caution.
The view is indeed grand. From here, you can see the curvature of the world... if you look closely enough.
I am the Witness of the Roll. I have seen every climb and every plummet. I am... perfectly balanced.
Loneliness is for those who cannot keep themselves centered. I require only gravity and my own surface tension.
